subject: Materials for Reg CB HRBP Updates - 16 July 2025

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Pls find attached deck for Reg CB HRBP Updates tomorrow:

*Meeting Agenda*

   - MY offshore team Hiring Update
   - Reg CB HC Allocation & Proposed SG Urgent Hiring
   - ID SIP CS Team Update

let me know if you have any queries, thank you.

*Emily Lin, 林佑容*
Shopee | People Team

content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 4

   - We will choose between #1 and #6 right?

And ideally we should take
   internal transfer right?

Slide 5

   - On #2 – How do we intend to reduce to 7 by Q4?
- Will we be adding the CS HC from the local markets yet?

Slide 6

   - How will we deal with #4 to #10?

If they are decent, we should quickly
   find them roles in local teams?

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Pls find the replies in blue below, we will also go through each with you
in later meeting.

Slide 4

   - We will choose between #1 and #6 right?  And ideally we should take
   internal transfer right?


Yes we currently have two candidates in the pipeline for the team lead role
and are rechecking if there are any other internal candidates to compare


Shuning will interview Candidate #1 this Friday, after which we’ll decide
who will take over. Yes, we will also pursue internal transfer options


For reference

Cuiwei feedback for #1 (internal candidate)
+relevant experiences with campaign teams for 3-4 years

+mature team manager, experience in coaching new team members, willing to
learn first and then transfer to team

+high willingness to take on analytical work and identify growth
opportunities

(?) her understanding on how SIP marketing works and daily work/expectation
is still limited, may take time to ramp up knowledge/skillset (i.e.
handholding from zhang yu/ailin is expected to be at least 2-3 months)

Cuiwei feedback for #6 (external candidate)

(+) relevant experiences in lazada, solid track record

(+) demonstrated the drive to continuously improve and optimize

(+) experience in leading team
(?) feels a bit overqualified at the rank



Slide 5

   - On #2 – How do we intend to reduce to 7 by Q4?
   - Will we be adding the CS HC from the local markets yet?

SIP Commercial Project: Current team of 12 members, with the following
breakdown:

   -

   High performers to retain: 3
   -

   Under performance review: 7
   -

   Confirmed to manage out: 2

We will review the performance of the 7 members. If they are suitable for
project roles, we will prioritize retaining them on the team. If they are
ok but only support BAU tasks, we will transfer them to BAU roles or manage
them out accordingly.

CS HC Update:


   - ID: Final check on HC/namelist — 2 FTEs to transfer in, rest via
